tutorial.accountIsolatedContent:
Isolated account means:
• There are unpaid invoices past due date
• Internet service temporarily disabled

How to reactivate:
1. Open Invoice menu
2. Pay all outstanding invoices
3. After payment confirmed (max 15 minutes)
4. Internet will automatically activate

If paid but not active:
• Wait 15-30 minutes for automatic process
• Or contact customer service for manual activation

Important: Pay invoices on time to avoid isolation.
tutorial.changeWifiNameContent:
1. Open WiFi Settings menu
2. Enter new WiFi name in 'WiFi Name' field
3. Fill in WiFi password (or leave unchanged)
4. Click 'Save Changes' button
5. WiFi will restart and new name will appear
6. Reconnect your devices with new WiFi name
tutorial.changeWifiPasswordContent:
1. Open WiFi Settings menu
2. Enter new password (minimum 8 characters)
3. Click eye icon to show password
4. Click 'Save Changes' button
5. All devices will be disconnected
6. Reconnect with new password

Tips: Use combination of letters, numbers, and symbols for maximum security
tutorial.howToPayContent:
1. Open Invoice menu in portal
2. Select the invoice you want to pay
3. Click 'Pay' button
4. Choose payment method (Bank Transfer, E-Wallet, etc)
5. Follow payment instructions
6. After successful payment, status will automatically update
tutorial.noInternetContent:
Troubleshooting steps:

1. Check payment status
   → Make sure invoice is paid

2. Restart device
   → Turn off and on modem/router

3. Check WiFi connection
   → Make sure connected to correct WiFi

4. Check indicator lights
   → Make sure all lights are on normally

5. Forgot password or forget network
   → Try reconnecting

If still problematic, immediately contact customer service.
tutorial.paymentMethodsContent:
We accept various payment methods:
• Bank Transfer (BCA, Mandiri, BNI, BRI)
• E-Wallet (GoPay, OVO, Dana, ShopeePay)
• Retail Outlets (Indomaret, Alfamart)
• Credit/Debit Card

Payments will be processed automatically within 5-15 minutes.
tutorial.slowInternetContent:
Causes and Solutions:

1. Too many connected devices
   → Disconnect unused devices

2. Server/website being accessed is busy
   → Try another website

3. Downloading/uploading large files
   → Wait until finished

4. Virus/Malware
   → Scan computer with antivirus

5. Too far from router
   → Move device closer or use repeater

If still slow, contact customer service for technical check.
tutorial.viewInvoiceContent:
1. Open Invoice menu
2. Click on Invoice History card
3. All invoices (Paid, Unpaid, Overdue) will be displayed
4. Click 'Pay' button for unpaid invoices
tutorial.wifiNotWorkingContent:
Solutions:
1. Restart modem/router (unplug and plug back)
2. Wait 2-3 minutes for indicator lights to stabilize
3. Check if WiFi appears
4. If not showing, contact customer service

Also check:
• Is the invoice paid?
• Is the power cable properly connected?
• Is the WiFi indicator light on?

tpl.broadcastBody:
Dear Salfanet Customer,

We have important information we would like to share with you.

Thank you for your attention and we apologize for any inconvenience.

Best regards,
Salfanet
tpl.tagihanBody:
Dear Salfanet Customer,

We would like to remind you that your internet bill for this month is due soon.

Please make your payment promptly to ensure your internet service remains active without interruption.

To view your bill details and make a payment, please open the Salfanet app.

Thank you,
Salfanet
tpl.infoBody:
Dear Salfanet Customer,

Here is the latest update regarding our internet service.

For more information, feel free to contact our team or open the Salfanet app.

Thank you for your trust,
Salfanet
tpl.maintenanceBody:
Dear Salfanet Customer,

We will be performing routine maintenance on our network in the near future.

During the maintenance period, internet service may be temporarily disrupted. We will work to complete this as quickly as possible.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. This maintenance is conducted to improve our service quality.

Thank you for your understanding,
Salfanet
tpl.promoBody:
Dear Salfanet Customer,

There is a special offer you don't want to miss!

Get the best deals on high-quality internet service at an affordable price, exclusively for you.

For complete information and registration, contact our team now or visit our office.

Thank you,
Salfanet
tpl.gangguanBody:
Dear Salfanet Customer,

We would like to inform you that there is currently a network disruption in some of our service areas.

Our technical team is working hard to resolve this issue and restore your service as quickly as possible.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience and understanding.

Best regards,
Salfanet
